name: Type 039A Yuan-class Submarine
description: China's advanced diesel-electric attack submarine featuring air-independent propulsion for extended submerged endurance. A cost-effective littoral warfare platform produced in large numbers.

specialAbilities.name: Air-Independent Propulsion
specialAbilities.description: Stirling engine AIP allows extended submerged patrols without snorkeling, greatly reducing detection risk.

specialAbilities.name: Covert Mine Laying
specialAbilities.description: Can deploy naval mines in enemy shipping lanes and chokepoints without surfacing.
